APRIL 9, 1908

“rhe Trustees of Princeton University met in stated

session in the Trustees!

Room in the Chancellor Green Library, Princeton,

New Jersey, at eleven o'clock on Thursday morning April 9, 1908. The President of the University in the chair..., \ The meeting was opened with prayer by Dr. Frazer. The following Trustees were present:

Woodrow Wilson, President of the University

John A. Stewart

M. Taylor Pyne

David R. Frazer

George B. Stewart

Cyrus H. MeCormick

John Dixon

Melancthon W. Jacobus

William J. Magie

Bayard Henry

Simon J. McPherson

Cornelius C. Cuyler

DeWitt C. Blair

Charles Wood

Alexander Van Rensselaer

John L. Cadwalader

David B. Jones

Archibald D. Russell

John DeWitt

Robert Garrett

Henry B. Thompson

Edward W. Sheldon

Andrew C. Imbrie
